system.flavor: Your bandoliers contain more than just weaponry.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit or pull target 1 space.
Conserve may use the following version of this ability instead:
  [Arsenal Flash Bomb — 1 action, range 1-2, zone. Zone a cross 1 space zone in range. Foes caught inside take 2 piercing damage. The center space of the zone is an obscured space.]
Excel may also trigger the flash bomb effect.
(Excel on a total final attack roll of 8+. This threshold is reduced by anything that reduces critical hit threshold.)
